channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [updated] Elastio - Advanced Ransomware Protection (elastio) has changed the description of the plan named elastio
item.description:
*before*: Elastio protects cloud object storage by performing expert data integrity scans that detect ransomware encryption, insider-driven data compromise, and data corruption - threats that otherwise evade traditional security tools until it's too late. Pricing is based on the amount of front-end data protected by Elastio’s scans. Elastio uses a tiered pricing model that starts at $0.05 per GB of the high watermark of data protected by Elastio's scans., *after*: Elastio protects cloud object storage by performing expert data integrity scans that detect ransomware encryption, insider-driven data compromise, and data corruption - threats that otherwise evade traditional security tools until it's too late.
Pricing is based on the amount of IBM Cloud Object Storage protected by Elastio's scans. Pricing tiers below is reflected in GB/month: the more you protect, the lower the unit cost.
